label: Internal Reporting Channel Technical Setup Documentation
description: Technical documentation proving the existence and configuration of the internal reporting channel, including system architecture, access controls, encryption measures, and channel options (written/oral/in-person).
format: Technical documentation, system screenshots, or audit report

label: Internal Reporting Channel Policy and Procedure Documentation
description: Written policy or procedure document governing the operation of the internal reporting channel, including how reports are received, handled, escalated, and followed up on, and how confidentiality is maintained.

label: Designation of Impartial Person or Department
description: Written designation document identifying the person or department competent to receive and follow up on reports, including their role, responsibilities, and reporting lines.
format: Signed designation letter or HR document

label: Whistleblowing/Internal Reporting Policy Communicated to Staff
description: The internal whistleblowing policy or information notice made available to workers, including coverage of channel access, confidentiality protections, anti-retaliation provisions, and the right to use external channels.
format: Policy document and evidence of distribution (email records, intranet screenshots)

label: Evidence of Communication of Reporting Channel to Workers
description: Records demonstrating that information about the internal reporting channel was made accessible to workers, contractors, subcontractors, suppliers, and other relevant persons.
format: Email distribution records, intranet logs, supplier communication records

label: Acknowledgement of Report Receipt Record
description: Record proving that acknowledgement of receipt was sent to the reporting person within 7 days, including the date of receipt and date of acknowledgement.

label: Investigation Record for Each Report
description: Case file documenting the investigation steps taken in response to a report, including assessment of the breach, actions taken or intended, and referrals to competent authorities if applicable.

label: Feedback Communication Record
description: Record proving that feedback on the outcome of the follow-up was communicated to the reporting person within 3 months of the acknowledgement date.

label: Access Controls Documentation for Reporting System
description: Technical documentation showing that access to report data is restricted to authorised personnel only, including role-based access control configurations and audit logs.
format: System access control documentation, audit logs

label: Training Records for Staff Handling Reports
description: Records showing that authorised staff and managers received training on the whistleblowing system, confidentiality requirements, and anti-retaliation obligations.

label: Case Management Records of All Reports Received
description: Complete records of all reports received, including date received, channel used, subject matter, acknowledgement date, follow-up actions, and feedback date. Maintained in compliance with GDPR and confidentiality requirements.
format: Case management system export (anonymised or controlled access)

label: Anti-Retaliation Policy
description: Documented anti-retaliation policy prohibiting all retaliatory actions listed in Article 19, communicated to all staff, and including the process for reporting persons to raise retaliation concerns.

label: Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA) for Reporting Channel
description: DPIA documenting the privacy risks associated with the internal reporting channel and the mitigation measures implemented, as required under GDPR Article 35.

label: Privacy Notice Covering Whistleblowing Processing
description: GDPR-compliant privacy notice informing data subjects (reporting persons, concerned persons) about the processing of their personal data through the reporting channel.

label: Register of Processing Activities (RoPA) Entry for Reporting Channel
description: Entry in the entity's GDPR Register of Processing Activities covering the whistleblowing/internal reporting processing activity.

label: Competent Authority External Reporting Channel Setup Documentation
description: Documentation by the competent authority of the established external reporting channel, including its technical configuration, operational procedures, and independence from other authority functions.

label: Published Public Information on External Reporting Channel
description: Evidence that the competent authority has published clear, complete, and accessible information on how to use the external reporting channel, including procedures, confidentiality protections, and anti-retaliation measures.
